title: Supplementaries Rope Tweaks
description: Changes for Supplementaries' rope and flax textures
body:
## About
A texture pack made specifically for [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries). It gives all Flax and Rope textures a new and fresh look so they fit nicely with a cozy and rustic aesthetic, while in line with Minecraft's style.

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a9a113ecb931d8da6e14b1e29f1636b2b62b022.png)

The pack also renames Ropes to Flax Ropes. If Farmer's Delight is also installed, it'll rename that mod's Ropes to Straw Ropes, as to avoid confusion.

Farmer's Delight and Re-Crafted were a huge influence in the textures so big props to the authors and artists that worked on those projects.

## Recommended
This pack fits nicely along with the following mods/texture packs, give them a try!
- [No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land)
- [Re-Crafted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farcrs-re-crafted)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Detail Brush](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detail-brush)
- [Supplementaries Touch-Ups](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/supplementaries-touch-ups?version=1.21.1)
